title: Surgeon Vacancy at Medtronic India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Medtronic India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Medtronic India in Agra offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Medtronic India:
Medtronic India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medtronic India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
